puzzle.title: The Humble Truth Seekers
puzzle.intro: In a land of ancient power and sorcery, a great confrontation unfolds. One side wields the authority of divine signs, while the other attempts to match the impossible. The outcome will forever change the course of history. Can you uncover the identity of those who witnessed the ultimate truth and humbled themselves before it?
clues: We witnessed signs that went beyond the tricks of sorcery
We all fell in prostration, unable to deny the truth
We recognized that these signs came from the One True God
We were the first community to embrace faith in such a dramatic way
We were promised paradise as our recompense for our belief
Our ropes and staffs became serpents before our eyes, yet we chose submission

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: The encounter with Prophet Musa's staff
The trial of Prophet Hud's wind
The challenge from Prophet Salih's she-camel
The great flood sent upon a prophet
The journey of a prophet inside a whale
trial.answer: The encounter with Prophet Musa's staff

puzzle.arabic: فَأُلْقِىَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ سُجَّدًۭا قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّ هَـٰرُونَ وَمُوسَىٰ
puzzle.verse: So the magicians fell down in prostration. They said, "We have believed in the Lord of Aaron and Moses." (20:70)
